title: SAF Drone Strikes Funeral in Al Sunut, West Kordofan — 7 Killed, 39 Wounded
detail: A drone strike attributed to SAF hit a funeral gathering in Al Sunut, West Kordofan on March 27, killing 7 people and injuring 39. The attack followed a previous strike on Al Sunut on March 10 that had killed at least 50 people traveling in a lorry. SPLM-N (al-Hilu) issued a statement claiming strikes throughout the week caused over 60 people killed and over 100 injured. Al Sunut is in RSF-held West Kordofan and has been repeatedly struck by SAF drones in early 2026.

media.caption: SAF drone strikes funeral in Al Sunut, West Kordofan

title: SAF Drone Strikes Zalingei, Hits IDP Camp Khamsa Daqaiq in Central Darfur
detail: SAF drones struck Zalingei (the Central Darfur state capital under RSF occupation) on Friday evening March 27, hitting residential buildings and parts of the Khamsa Daqaiq camp for displaced persons. The RSF civil administration condemned the attack, reporting extensive damage to homes in the eastern district. The attack followed the pattern of SAF drone strikes on RSF-held towns and continued the following day on March 28.

media.caption: SAF drone strikes Zalingei IDP camp Khamsa Daqaiq in Central Darfur

title: Second SAF Strike on Lagawa Kills 15 in West Kordofan
detail: SAF forces conducted a second aerial strike on Lagawa, West Kordofan, killing at least 15 people according to a medical source. The strike followed the first Lagawa attack four days earlier (March 23) which had killed 15–17 people. The repeated targeting of the same town underscored the SAF's ongoing campaign against RSF-held population centers in Kordofan. Lagawa, a town of significant civilian population in West Kordofan, was one of multiple RSF-held towns struck by SAF drones in a pattern that humanitarian organizations condemned alongside the RSF's own strikes on civilian areas. Total deaths in the two Lagawa attacks alone reached 30+. The RSF continued to blame SAF for systematic civilian targeting.

media.caption: Second SAF strike on Lagawa kills 15 in West Kordofan
